title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after recent deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout issue
description: Stripe payment requests are timing out during checkout.

title: Profile image upload failed
description: Users receive a 500 error when uploading profile images.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Sales data on the dashboard does not match database records.

title: Email verification not sending
description: New users are not receiving verification emails.

title: Slow API response
description: Book listing API takes more than 5 seconds to respond.

title: Logout not working properly
description: Users remain logged in after clicking logout button.

title: Broken link in footer
description: Privacy policy link in footer redirects to 404 page.

title: Database connection error
description: MongoDB connection drops intermittently in production.

title: Search functionality not filtering correctly
description: Search results show unrelated books despite correct query.

title: JWT token expires too early
description: Users are logged out before token expiration time.

title: Book upload image distorted
description: Uploaded cover images appear stretched on the frontend.

title: Cloudinary upload failing
description: Signed upload request returns unauthorized error.

title: CORS error on production
description: Frontend cannot access API due to CORS policy restriction.

title: Pagination not working
description: Next page button does not load additional data.
